Brazil's Vieira Says "We Are Waiting For The U.S. To Respond To Our Trade Proposals"

data.title: Netradyne customers awarded over 100 million DriverStars for safe driving, leading the industry shift towards positive reinforcement.
data.description: In San Diego, Netradyne®, a leading SaaS firm in fleet safety, revealed a remarkable milestone in driver safety. Their revolutionary AI-driven positive driver recognition system has now issued over 100 million DriverStar events worldwide. This achievement underscores the widespread acceptance of Netradyne's Driver•i® safety platform in the industry. Netradyne's initiative marks a significant shift towards emphasizing positive driver behavior, with their customers at the forefront of this movement.

data.title: Coastal Mississippi sees rapid growth with multiple new openings, boosting summer tourism. #Biloxi #MississippiGulfCoast
data.description: Exciting changes are underway along the picturesque Mississippi Gulf Coast with numerous developments lined up for the summer travel season. Coastal Mississippi is thrilled to share the news of multiple upcoming openings, boosting the region's appeal to visitors. Stay tuned for several new attractions and experiences coming soon to enhance the tourism landscape.
San Francisco Fed President Mary Daly is scheduled to speak on Bloomberg TV at 12:45 PM ET today

data.title: Stay updated with latest crypto trends: news on Bitcoin, DeFi, NFTs, Web3, and regulations impacting prices and events.
data.description: Curious about the latest in the crypto world? Stay informed with updates on the daily shifts and occurrences influencing the price of Bitcoin, advancements in blockchain technology, developments in decentralized finance (DeFi), the rising popularity of non-fungible tokens (NFTs), the emergence of Web3 platforms, and updates on crypto regulations. Stay tuned for more on these fast-paced trends and essential updates.

data.title: Disneyland Resort marks 70th anniversary with CEO Bob Iger speaking to thousands of cast members, celebrating with pre-opening events.
data.description: Actors were some of the initial individuals to make and broadcast new memories on the 70th anniversary, celebrated by The Walt Disney Company's CEO Bob Iger through a special address to countless cast members. Festivities featured a pre-opening gathering for the cast and a ceremony where veteran cast members raised the company flag.

data.title: CrowdStrike named a Leader in 2025 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Endpoint Protection Platforms for the 6th time. #CyberSecurity
data.description: In Austin, Texas, CrowdStrike (NASDAQ: CRWD) revealed it has secured the position of Leader in the 2025 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Endpoint Protection Platforms (EPP) for the sixth consecutive occasion. Furthermore, it was highlighted for the third consecutive time as being placed furthest on the right for Completeness of Vision, and ranking the highest for Ability to Execute among all vendors assessed. The AI-native CrowdStrike Falcon platform remains at the forefront of endpoint protection in the AI era, offering superior industry standards.

data.title: COVU acquires Mitchell Insurance Agency, their sixth acquisition in Rolling Thunder campaign, to strengthen AI-native platform.
data.description: In San Francisco, COVU, Inc., a leading provider of AI-driven customer service solutions for the insurance sector, revealed the purchase of Mitchell Insurance Agency. Mitchell, a well-regarded family-run agency in California, holds strong connections within the local market, catering to both commercial and personal lines customers. This acquisition marks COVU's sixth successful addition in its Rolling Thunder initiative, signaling progress in the company's mission to enrich its AI-based platform.

data.title: Confident Security launches provably private AI system with $4.2M funding from Decibel, South Park, Ex Ante, and Swyx.
data.description: In San Francisco, Confident Security has officially launched its innovative technology for provably private AI interactions, backed by a significant $4.2 million in funding. This funding round received support from investors including Decibel, South Park Commons, Ex Ante, and Swyx. With the growing reliance on AI systems to manage sensitive information like medical records, legal documents, and trade secrets, privacy has emerged as a top priority. Confident Security aims to tackle this issue by integrating privacy measures as an integral component of AI infrastructure.

data.title: Cirrus introduces handcrafted bags made from upcycled parachute material at EAA AirVenture Oshkosh 2025.
data.description: In Duluth, Minnesota, Knoxville, Tennessee, and Oshkosh, Wisconsin, Cirrus Aircraft Limited (2507:HK) is launching a new line of handcrafted travel bags made from upcycled parachute material from the Cirrus Airframe Parachute System® (CAPS®). These bags, crafted by the renowned Duluth Pack, the oldest canvas and leather bag manufacturer in the U.S., will be debuted at EAA AirVenture Oshkosh 2025. Combining sustainability with robustness and style, these unique bags offer a blend of aviation-inspired design and eco-conscious materials, marking a significant step towards promoting environmentally-friendly practices in the aviation industry.

data.title: VICIS, Schutt helmets top new Virginia Tech safety ratings; only top advanced protection earns 5-star ratings.
data.description: This week, the Virginia Tech Helmet Lab in Plainview, Indiana, adjusted its helmet testing methods to align with the latest concussion risk standards. VICIS and Schutt helmets have consistently outperformed in these updated protocols, maintaining high safety ratings. In contrast, several other widely used helmet models have seen a decline in their ratings. The goal of this adjustment is to reserve 5-star ratings for helmets offering the most superior protection. Consequently, the count of youth football helmets achieving a 5-star rating has decreased.

data.title: VTEX wins big in 2025 B2B Paradigm Combine with 16 Gold medals, highest total in the competition.
data.description: A business news report from New York highlights that VTEX, traded on NYSE as VTEX, a key player in connected commerce, demonstrated excellence in the Paradigm’s 2025 Combine Reports. Across both Enterprise and Midmarket editions, VTEX secured awards in all 24 categories. Notably, they achieved a groundbreaking achievement in B2B commerce by clinching 16 Gold medals, the most in this year’s Paradigm B2B Combine. This success underscores VTEX’s remarkable performance in essential enterprise aspects, including securing a rare Gold for Total Cost of O.
ICE Officials Will Gain Access To Personally Identifiable Information For All Medicaid Enrollees, According To An Agreement Obtained By The AP.

data.title: UNITS Franchising Group plans to expand globally to France, UK, Germany, UAE, Canada, and Australia by 2025-2026.
data.description: In Charleston, South Carolina, on July 17, 2025, UNITS Franchising Group Inc. disclosed their intention for significant franchise growth on a global scale. The company, which oversees UNITS Moving and Portable Storage, set forth plans for expansion into six key countries: France, the United Kingdom, Germany, the United Arab Emirates, Canada, and Australia. This move signifies a bold step towards extending their reach into new markets, with the potential for substantial growth and impact.

data.title: Former PayPal exec José Fernández da Ponte becomes President of Stellar Development Foundation to boost global growth for XLM.
data.description: Former PayPal executive, José Fernández da Ponte, has taken on the roles of President and Chief Growth Officer at the Stellar (XLM) Development Foundation. His aim is to boost digital asset adoption and scale infrastructure for the project.

data.title: Novartis raises outlook, reports Q2 earnings of $14.05 billion with 12% sales growth and $5.93 billion operating income. Initiates $10 billion buyback.
data.description: Swiss pharmaceutical company Novartis AG (NYSE: NVS) released its second-quarter 2025 earnings report, announcing an increase in its full-year earnings forecast. Sales for the quarter amounted to $14.05 billion, just slightly below analysts' expectations of $14.06 billion. Year-on-year, net sales saw a 12% rise (+11% on constant currency basis) with core operating income reaching $5.93 billion - up by 20% (+21% on constant currency basis). Notable sales growth was attributed to the performance of key products including breast cancer treatment Kisqali ($1.18 billion, +64% cc), heart failure drug Entresto ($2.36 billion, +22% cc), multiple sclerosis treatment Kesimpta ($1.08 billion, +33% cc), Scemblix ($298 million, +79% cc), and Leqvio ($298 million). The corrected title now accurately states that the company raised its outlook, contrary to the initial misrepresentation of an "outlook cut". For the complete story, visit Benzinga.com.

Netflix Q2 Earnings Preview (Post-Bell) •Revenue: ~$11.1B (+16% YoY) •EPS: ~$7.08 (+45% YoY) •Margins: ~33% •Key Drivers: •Ad-tier adoption (50% of new US users) •Price hikes, password-sharing crackdown •Sports/events (NFL, WWE), hit content

data.title: Vegamour unveils GRO+ Advanced Supplements for hair longevity, a dual-pill system developed by MDs.
data.description: On July 17, 2025, in Los Angeles, Vegamour, a company specializing in hair longevity through plant-based biotechnology, revealed the release of their newest product: GRO+ Advanced Hair Growth & Density Supplements. This innovative dual-pill system, developed by medical doctors and supported by extensive clinical research, is set to revolutionize the hair growth industry.

data.title: Festi hf. expects EBITDA of ISK 3.9 billion in Q2 2025, up from ISK 2.9 billion last year, an increase of ISK 1.0 billion YoY.
data.description: The preliminary management accounts for Q2 2025 indicate that the EBITDA is projected to be ISK 3.9 billion, a significant rise from ISK 2.9 billion recorded in the corresponding period in the previous year. This marks a year-on-year increase of ISK 1.0 billion, or ISK 0.6 billion when excluding Lyfja EBITDA, as Lyfja was not under the Group during the same quarter last year.
